issues.title: Enhancement: Implementation of an Application Menu System
[P0-07] Render ForEach and keyed dynamic collections correctly
[P1-12] Align View, ContentBuilder, ViewModifier, and ModifiedContent with SwiftUI
[P1-13] Align Binding, State, Environment, AppStorage, and Observation with SwiftUI
[P1-14] Add composable Scene modifiers and Scene environment propagation
[P1-15] Align layout primitives and terminal geometry semantics with SwiftUI
[P1-16] Add environment-driven shared View modifiers with exact signatures
[P1-17] Replace the FocusState collision with SwiftUI-compatible focus APIs
[P1-18] Align controls and style protocols with SwiftUI
[P1-19] Align List, Section, Menu, Table, and navigation containers with SwiftUI
[P1-20] Implement true viewport-driven lazy collections
[P1-21] Schedule animations only while committed and visible
[P1-22] Harden and test the asynchronous image pipeline
[P1-23] Align Text, Image, localization, and presentation APIs with SwiftUI
[P2-26] Add terminal-native scrolling, navigation stack, and tab navigation
[P2-27] Add form, disclosure, grid, and structured input primitives
[P2-28] Add terminal accessibility, search, refresh, and application actions
[P2-29] Add terminal-native Animation, Transaction, and TimelineView semantics
[P2-30] Reduce the public implementation surface and namespace TUI-only APIs
[P1-35] Add terminal input, hit-testing, and gesture semantics
[P2-36] Add portable clipboard and data-transfer APIs
[P2-37] Add portable file and document workflows
